dsl_rule.translation_notes: Doji approximated using small body size relative to ATR. Entry is context-dependent (LONG in bull markets, SHORT in bear markets). Exit window set to 7 days (median of 6-7 days for bull, 6 days for bear). Used moving average crossover as reasonable reversal condition per AUTHOR_SILENT rule. Note: True Doji would require open==close with specific wick ratios, but body metric provides practical approximation within allowed indicators.

source_rule_text: Doji candle pattern: A candlestick where the open and close are at or near the same price level, appearing more frequently in bull markets than bear markets
